mistakes.message: Wellbeing Agent rejected the selected calendar.
mistakes.evidence: The plan makes good progress by front-loading the algorithms work. However, it introduces two significant wellbeing issues: a late-night work block ending at 22:00 on Wednesday and an overfilled, cognitively heavy Sunday. These patterns risk fatigue and poor sleep, which are detrimental to performance and stress levels, especially before a final presentation. The plan is not yet humane enough to follow sustainably.
